title: Section 50
content: 1[50. Auditors.--(1) Not less than two auditors shall be appointed, and their remuneration fixed, by the Central Government. (2) The auditors shall hold office for such term not exceeding one year as the Central Government may fix while appointing them, and shall be eligible for re-appointment.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 62 of 1948, s. 7 and the Schedule, for section 50 (w.e.f. 1-1-1949).
